Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'backend'\)
from app.services.fast_intent import classify_intent

tests = [
    \('Everything You Need to Know About Writing Successfully', 'https://copyblogger.com/everything-you-need-to-know-about-writing-successfully', 'informational'\),
    \('Why I Won\\u2019t Buy Seth Godin\\u2019s Meatball Sundae', 'https://copyblogger.com/seth-godin-meatball-sundae', 'informational'\),
    \('Top 10 Blogs for Writers 2007', 'https://copyblogger.com/top-10-blogs-for-writers-2007', 'commercial'\),
    \('Clever vs. Descriptive Headlines: Which Works Better', 'https://copyblogger.com/clever-vs-descriptive-headlines-which-works-better', 'commercial'\),
    \('How to Write Ebooks that Sell', 'https://copyblogger.com/how-to-write-ebooks-that-sell', 'informational'\),
    \('About Us', 'https://example.com/about', 'navigational'\),
    \('Contact Support', 'https://example.com/contact-us', 'navigational'\),
]

all_pass = True
for title, url, expected in tests:
    result = classify_intent\(title, url\)
    status = 'OK' if result == expected else 'FAIL'
    if result != expected:
        all_pass = False
    print\(f'{status}: [{result}] {title[:50]}'\)

print\(\)
print\('ALL PASS' if all_pass else 'SOME FAILED'\)
")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''total:'''', d.get\(''''total''''\), ''''returned:'''', len\(d.get\(''''posts'''',[]\)\)\)")
